title: Design System: Radio Milwaukee Playlist v2

display.purpose: Page titles only. Hero headlines on widget about tabs and dashboard page headers.

headline.purpose: Section headings within the dashboard. Reduced from Display weight, never used on widgets.

body-lg.purpose: Intro paragraphs, lede copy on About tab.

label.purpose: Buttons, form labels, tab labels, station badges. 0.02em letter-spacing for breathing room.

caption.purpose: Timestamps, durations, play counts, badges. 13px floor; tabular numerals on by default.

shadows.name: popover-ambient
shadows.purpose: Operator dashboard popovers and dropdown menus only. Reads as floating above the table beneath. Reserved for genuinely floating affordances; flat-by-default rule applies everywhere else.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Enter and reveal: live-update fades in, tab indicator slides in, modal opens.

motion.name: ease-in
motion.purpose: Exit and dismiss: modal close, popover close, item removal.

motion.name: ease-in-out
motion.purpose: Move and reposition: tab indicator translation between active states, ingestion-health pulse breathing.

motion.name: dur-micro
motion.purpose: Hover state changes, color transitions on buttons and links.

motion.name: dur-short
motion.purpose: Live-update fades when a new play arrives (Convex subscription).

motion.name: dur-medium
motion.purpose: Tab and section transitions; widget content cross-fade.

motion.name: dur-long
motion.purpose: Modal entry and exit, dashboard page transitions.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: All durations collapse to zero when prefers-reduced-motion: reduce. Live updates appear instantly; ingestion-health pulse becomes a static color; no fade, no slide.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Donate / submit / primary CTA. CTA Coral background, warm-off-white label. ≤10% of any surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #E84F2F; color: #F7F3EE; border: 0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #CC3F22; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E84F2F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Live Button
components.description: LIVE event affordance only. Amber background, warm-near-black label. Forbidden as a generic CTA.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-live" type="button"><svg class="ds-btn-live__dot" viewBox="0 0 8 8" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="4" fill="currentColor"/></svg>See them tonight</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #FFB81C; color: #0E0F11; border: 0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-live:hover { background: #E8A50F; } .ds-btn-live:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E84F2F; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-live__dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Toolbar / secondary action. Transparent background, primary text color, smaller padding.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #1A1A1A; border: 0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.06); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E84F2F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Default surface. Light-mode card differentiates by warm hairline border, no shadow.
components.html:
88Nine Playlist

Now playing on the indie alternative stream.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid #E8E5DE; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-card__title { margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-family: 'General Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-card__body { margin: 0; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; color: #6B6E73; }

components.name: Event Card
components.description: Interleaved LIVE event row inside a play-list. Tinted amber background + leading amber border-left. The one exception to the no-side-stripe-borders rule.
components.html:
LIVE TONIGHT

Big Thief at Pabst Theater

Doors 7:00 PM · Tickets $35
components.css: .ds-card-event { background: #FFF6E0; color: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid #E8E5DE; border-left: 4px solid #FFB81C; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-card-event__pill { display: inline-block; background: #FFB81C; color: #0E0F11; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-event__title { margin: 0 0 4px 0; font-family: 'General Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-event__meta { margin: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #6E6C68; font-feature-settings: "tnum"; }

components.name: Tab
components.description: Horizontal tablist item. 44px min-height, label typography, mono uppercase. Inset focus ring (-2px offset) so the outline survives overflow:auto scroll-fade.
components.css: .ds-tablist { display: flex; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #E8E5DE; overflow-x: auto; } .ds-tab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 44px; background: transparent; color: #6B6E73; border: 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1), border-bottom-color 250ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-tab:hover { color: #1A1A1A; } .ds-tab--active { color: #1A1A1A; border-bottom-color: #1A1A1A; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E84F2F; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Live Badge
components.description: Pill badge for the LIVE label. Amber background, warm-near-black text, mono uppercase.
components.css: .ds-badge-live { display: inline-block; background: #FFB81C; color: #0E0F11; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: 8px filled circle paired with text label. Status indicators always pair color + text + shape; the dot alone is forbidden.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #1A1A1A; } .ds-status__dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #34D399; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Dashboard search field. Warm hairline border, body typography, coral focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-input-label__text { font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #1A1A1A; } .ds-input-search { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid #E8E5DE; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: 'Geist', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; transition: border-color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: #6E6C68; } .ds-input-search:focus { outline: 0; } .ds-input-search:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E84F2F; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: This is the visual language of an indie music magazine that grew up listening to NPR. Type drives the hierarchy; album art drives the picture; everything else gets out of the way. The system serves two surfaces, an operator dashboard and embeddable widgets, but it's one set of tokens, one motion contract, one component vocabulary. Density flips between them, theme flips between them, but the bones are the same. The personality is knowing, restrained, distinctly Milwaukee: a curator who doesn't need to perform, civically grounded in a way that lets it look like Radio Milwaukee instead of like Generic Alternative Public Radio.
keyCharacteristics: One system, two surface modes (dashboard compact-dark, widget comfortable-light by default).
Two distinct accents: coral for CTAs, amber for LIVE; never collapsed into one red.
Album art square (radius 0); type does the structural work.
Reduced motion is a contract, not a polish item.
WCAG 2.2 AA is the floor on widgets: 13px minimum body, ≥4.5:1 contrast on every text token, 44px tap targets on tab buttons.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: CTA Coral covers ≤10% of any surface. Overuse softens the donate signal Radio Milwaukee depends on.

rules.name: The Two Jobs Rule
rules.body: CTA Coral and LIVE Amber are never interchangeable and never sit adjacent in conflicting roles. Coral urges action; amber announces presence.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Extremes Rule
rules.body: No #000000, no #FFFFFF. Every neutral is tinted toward the warm brand palette so the system feels like an editorial artifact, not a default Tailwind reset.

rules.name: The Color-Plus-Shape Rule
rules.body: Status indicators always pair color + text + shape. Color-only signaling is forbidden.

rules.name: The 13px Floor Rule
rules.body: Widget body text never goes below 13px. Older listeners are the audience; 11px and 12px captions were removed in the 2026-04-28 a11y pass and must not return.

rules.name: The Tabular Numerals Rule
rules.body: Every timestamp, duration, play count, and date renders with font-feature-settings: tnum so figures align cleanly in scrolling lists.

rules.name: The Three Faces Rule
rules.body: Display + body + mono. No fourth family loaded simultaneously per page.

rules.name: The No System Font Rule
rules.body: System fonts (Inter, Roboto, Arial, Helvetica, system-ui) are fallbacks only and never sit at the head of the font stack on dashboard surfaces.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Tonal stepping conveys hierarchy in dark mode; warm hairlines convey it in light mode. Shadows are reserved for genuinely floating affordances.

rules.name: The No-Glassmorphism Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur is forbidden as decoration. The system leans on print typography and tonal restraint.

dos: Do keep CTA Coral at ≤10% of any surface. Its rarity is the donation signal.
Do pair CTA Coral and LIVE Amber as semantically distinct. Coral urges action; amber announces presence.
Do use 13px as the body-text floor on widget surfaces.
Do hit ≥4.5:1 contrast on every text-on-background pair, ≥3:1 on focus indicators and non-text UI.
Do size widget tab buttons to a 44px minimum height.
Do use :focus-visible (not :focus) so mouse clicks never paint outlines but every Tab navigation lands somewhere visible.
Do use inset outline-offset: -2px on tab buttons inside scroll-clipping tablists.
Do ship reduced-motion as a contract: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce collapses transitions to 0ms across all surfaces.
Do load tabular numerals globally via font-feature-settings: tnum so figures align in lists.
Do let widget surfaces inherit display and body fonts from the host page via --rmke-font-*: inherit so the widget feels native on partner sites.
Do keep album art square (radius-none). It's the one element exempt from the system's roundness scale.
donts: Don't use #000000 or #FFFFFF. Use warm-near-black (#0E0F11) and warm-off-white (#F7F3EE).
Don't use system-font primary stacks (Inter, Roboto, Arial, Helvetica, system-ui). They are fallbacks only.
Don't use purple, violet, or indigo gradients as a primary or accent color, anywhere.
Don't ship a hero-metric template (big number / small label / supporting stats / gradient accent).
Don't ship a three-column feature grid with icons in colored circles.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Decoration-only, never meaningful.
Don't apply border-left (or border-right) greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or list items. The LIVE Event Row is the one exception, by named exception.
Don't use bubbly uniform border-radius on every element.
Don't use emoji as UI icons.
Don't use color-only signaling. Status indicators always pair color + text + shape.
Don't auto-play audio or video of any kind.
Don't use Powered by footers in a different visual language than the host page.
Don't nest cards. A card never contains another card.
Don't drop body text below 13px on widget surfaces.
Don't introduce a fourth font family. Display + body + mono is the budget.
